description: The customer visits the factory, confirms the order, discusses payment, and arranges delivery.
visual_style: See style-guide.md for full consistency rules

scenes.description: Li Wei picks up the customer and shows the factory.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Welcome to our factory. Let me show you around.
lines.zh: 欢迎来到我们的工厂。让我带您参观一下。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: Thank you. How big is your factory?
lines.zh: 谢谢。你们的工厂多大？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: It covers about 10,000 square meters. We have about 120 workers.
lines.zh: 大约占地一万平米。我们有大约120名工人。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: Can we have a look at the workshop?
lines.zh: 我们可以看一下车间吗？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Of course. This way please. This is where we make the frames.
lines.zh: 当然。请这边走。这是我们做框架的地方。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: Your company is very big. I'm impressed.
lines.zh: 你们公司很大。我印象深刻。

scenes.description: The customer decides to place the order after the visit.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: I'm satisfied with your factory. Let's make the order now.
lines.zh: 我对你们的工厂很满意。我们现在下单吧。

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Great. So it's 100 desks and 100 chairs. The total is 110,000 RMB.
lines.zh: 太好了。那就是100张桌子和100张椅子。总共11万元。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: Can you deliver in two weeks?
lines.zh: 你们能在两周内交货吗？

scenes.description: They discuss deposit and balance payment.

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: You can pay 30% deposit now and the balance before delivery.
lines.zh: 您可以现在付30%定金，余款在发货前付清。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: Do you accept T/T or card?
lines.zh: 你们接受转账还是刷卡？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Both are fine. The deposit is 33,000 RMB.
lines.zh: 都可以。定金是3万3千元。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: No problem. I'll pay by card now.
lines.zh: 没问题。我现在刷卡。

scenes.description: They confirm packing details and shipping volume.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: How do you pack the furniture?
lines.zh: 你们怎么包装家具？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: Ordinary packing is carton with sponge. Wooden crates are available for extra cost.
lines.zh: 普通包装是纸箱加海绵。木箱需要额外付费。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: What is the total volume?
lines.zh: 总体积是多少？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: It's about 35 CBM in total. A 40 HQ container holds about 68 CBM.
lines.zh: 总共大约35立方米。40尺高柜大约能装68立方米。

scenes.description: They finalize the delivery schedule and say goodbye.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: When can you deliver the goods?
lines.zh: 你们什么时候可以发货？

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: In two weeks. We will load the container next Friday.
lines.zh: 两周后。我们下周五装柜。

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.en: Can you make it one week? We need them urgently.
lines.zh: 能缩短到一周吗？我们急需。

lines.speaker: Li Wei
lines.en: We are very busy, but we will try our best.
lines.zh: 我们很忙，但会尽力。
